cityDNA.coreFantasy: A warm gnomish service-city where healing, alchemy, relief, tenement life, ancestor memory, brass doors, and civic charms turn repair into public infrastructure.
cityDNA.readerTakeaway: Hearthglen is not cute gnome gadget scenery; the uploaded images show a mature civic city of care, repair, low domestic density, and ancestor continuity.
cityDNA.civilizationThesis: Hearthglen turns care into machinery and bureaucracy without letting warmth disappear.
cityDNA.visualIdentity: Granite, peat brick, oak, copper, dyed wool, brass fittings, blue lamps, garden terraces, low domes, apothecary glass, relief counters, laundry wells, ancestor masks, and compact useful streets.
cityDNA.culturalIdentity: Gnomish civic culture where usefulness, care, formula control, and ancestor memory are public institutions.
cityDNA.symbolicIdentity: Brass doors, hearth wheels, hanging charms, healing lanterns, notice plazas, laundry wells, ancestor masks, and bone lantern paths symbolize repair made civic.

canonLocks: Wonder: Gnomish Hearth-Wheel Garden of Brass Doors.
Seat of Power: Hanging Charms Veiled High Court.
Districts: Medical / Healing, Arcane / Alchemical Labs, Civic Services, Low Residential, Necropolis / Ancestor Quarter.

Exact uploaded anchors include Medical / Healing Civic Hall, Medical Healing Lantern Monument, Apothecary Court Nook, Arcane / Alchemical Labs Civic Hall, Blue-Lamp Monument, Formula Archive Nook, Civic Services Lantern Monument, Notice Plaza Nook, Low Residential Lantern Monument, Laundry Well Nook, Ancestor Masks Monument, and Bone Lantern Path Nook.
provisionalCanon: Hearthglen's highest civic virtue is repair.
The contact-sheet image pass reinforces warm service architecture rather than whimsical machinery alone.
cautionFlags: Fold image analysis into existing fields only.
Keep care, poverty, relief, and death visible as civic systems.

environment.environmentalLogic: The images show environment as practical care infrastructure: garden terraces, compact courts, wells, and warm thresholds move people toward services.

skyline: Gnomish Hearth-Wheel Garden of Brass Doors as wonder anchor
Hanging Charms Veiled High Court as civic authority
Healing Hall Beacon as signal landmark
low domes and dense service streets below

civilization.people: Gnomish citizens are practical, fussy, helpful, institutionally literate, and shown at street scale moving between clinics, labs, relief counters, homes, and ancestor paths.
civilization.governance: The Hanging Charms Veiled High Court governs care, aid rulings, formula regulation, archive sealing, and protective thresholds.
civilization.religion: Domestic-ancestral faith appears through hanging charms, ancestor masks, bone lantern paths, threshold blessings, and hearth-wheel rites.

streets.appearance: Compact, warm, gardened, and service-heavy, with brass doors, blue lamps, clinics, labs, relief notices, laundry wells, and ancestor lantern routes at pedestrian scale.
streets.movement: Movement follows low stairs, garden terraces, brass-door thresholds, service courts, relief queues, and laundry routes.
streets.lighting: Warm windows and blue civic lamps keep the city readable at night.
streets.weatherEffects: Rain gathers in garden steps, laundry wells, brass thresholds, and mossed courts.
streets.dayCycle: Healing halls, labs, relief notices, and service errands dominate the day.
streets.nightCycle: Ancestor lanterns, guarded labs, and quiet tenement repair dominate the night.

housing.wealthy: Gardened brass-door homes near court, healing halls, or formula archives.
housing.middle: Compact stone-and-timber homes over shops with shared wells and window herbs.
housing.poor: Low residential courts with laundry wells, drying lines, shared lamps, and practical repairs.

districts.name: Medical / Healing
districts.civicPurpose: Healing, triage, apothecary movement, and crisis response.
districts.visualIdentity: Medical / Healing Civic Hall, Healing Hall Beacon, Medical Healing Lantern Monument, Apothecary Court Nook.

districts.name: Arcane / Alchemical Labs
districts.civicPurpose: Regulated invention, formula keeping, and dangerous knowledge.
districts.visualIdentity: Arcane / Alchemical Labs Civic Hall, Alchemy Lab, Blue-Lamp Monument, Formula Archive Nook.

districts.name: Civic Services
districts.civicPurpose: Public aid, relief eligibility, notices, queues, and administrative care.
districts.visualIdentity: Civic Services Hall, Relief Hall, Civic Services Lantern Monument, Notice Plaza Nook.

districts.name: Low Residential
districts.civicPurpose: Domestic density, shared labor, and ordinary care.
districts.visualIdentity: Low Residential Civic Hall, Tenement Court, Low Residential Lantern Monument, Laundry Well Nook.

districts.name: Necropolis / Ancestor Quarter
districts.civicPurpose: Ancestor memory, death care, family continuity, and bone lantern routes.
districts.visualIdentity: Necropolis / Ancestor Quarter Civic Hall, Ancestor Vault, Ancestor Masks Monument, Bone Lantern Path Nook.

wonder.name: Gnomish Hearth-Wheel Garden of Brass Doors
wonder.visualRole: Large brass-door garden-wheel complex above compact service districts.
wonder.civicRole: Citywide symbol for repair, relief, threshold blessings, and communal meals.
storyHooks: A brass door opens only for the category of person the relief system forgot.

beacon.name: Healing Hall Beacon
beacon.symbolicRole: Warning bound to mercy and triage.
beacon.visualRole: Blue-lit medical signal integrated with healing halls and apothecary courts.
beacon.civicRole: Coordinates triage, healer musters, public warnings, and medicine distribution.
storyHooks: A Beacon change turns the whole city into a triage network.

seatOfPower.name: Hanging Charms Veiled High Court
seatOfPower.symbolicRole: Protective charm law and care governance.
seatOfPower.visualRole: Central court of warm stone, hanging charms, veiled entries, sealed archives, and audience terraces.
seatOfPower.civicRole: Handles aid rulings, healing disputes, formula regulation, archive sealing, and public petitions.
storyHooks: A court ruling proves care can become gatekeeping.

majorLandmarks.name: Alchemy Lab
majorLandmarks.symbolicRole: Dangerous invention put to public use.
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Lab towers, blue lamps, formula archives, glassware, and copper pipes.
storyHooks: A formula solves a crisis only if someone admits who was denied access.

majorLandmarks.name: Relief Hall
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Service hall with notice plaza, counters, queues, and civic lamps.
storyHooks: A notice changes who counts as eligible for help.

majorLandmarks.name: Tenement Court
majorLandmarks.symbolicRole: Care surviving in crowded ordinary life.
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Laundry well, lantern monument, drying lines, and small gardens.
storyHooks: A laundry-well rumor reaches the High Court before the notice does.

majorLandmarks.name: Ancestor Vault
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Vaults, masks, bone lantern path, and gardened stone.
storyHooks: A bone lantern marks the person the relief ledger erased.

districtDioramaGuidance: S1: Medical / Healing Civic Hall, Healing Hall Beacon, Medical Healing Lantern Monument, Apothecary Court Nook.
S2: Arcane / Alchemical Labs Civic Hall, Alchemy Lab, Blue-Lamp Monument, Formula Archive Nook.
S3: Civic Services Hall, Relief Hall, Civic Services Lantern Monument, Notice Plaza Nook.
S4: Low Residential Civic Hall, Tenement Court, Low Residential Lantern Monument, Laundry Well Nook.
S5: Necropolis / Ancestor Quarter Civic Hall, Ancestor Vault, Ancestor Masks Monument, Bone Lantern Path Nook.
mapBackgroundGuidance: Keep Gnomish Hearth-Wheel Garden of Brass Doors, Healing Hall Beacon, and Hanging Charms Veiled High Court legible together.
Use warm service-city density, gardens, brass doors, blue lamps, clinics, labs, relief halls, tenements, and ancestor paths.
requiredVisualElements: Gnomish Hearth-Wheel Garden of Brass Doors
